<!--------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

Functions for Bluetooth device management, UUID expansion, and SMPairingInfo state checks.


## Files
- **[bt_device.h](bt_device.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, comparing, and validating Bluetooth devices and their addresses.
- **[bt_uuid.h](bt_uuid.h.md)**: Functions to expand 16-bit and 32-bit UUIDs to 128-bit UUIDs using the Bluetooth base UUID.
- **[sm_util.h](sm_util.h.md)**: Functions for comparing and checking the state of SMPairingInfo and SM128BitKey structures.
